title: Higher Tier Capital Grants 2026
body: "The  Higher Tier Capital Grants 2026 guidance consists of:   applicant’s guide agreement holder’s guide Terms and Conditions   Use the guidance to apply for a Higher Tier Capital Grant from 5 January 2026.   Read the applicant’s guide to find out if you’re eligible for a grant and how to apply. Read the agreement holder’s guide to find out how to manage your agreement and make a claim for payment.   You can also apply for other capital grants at any time of the year.  Contact Rural Payments Agency  You can contact RPA by email, phone or post.   Rural Payments Agency  PO Box 324 Worksop S95 1DF  Email: ruralpayments@defra.gov.uk  Telephone: 03000 200 301 Monday to Friday, 8:30am to 5pm, except bank holidays Find out about call charges   "
